abilities.name: Demise (Scatter 3)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, summon up to three Gift of Thorns within 1".

abilities.name: Slither Off
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation on turn 1, summon up to three Gift of Thorns within 1" of it.

abilities.name: Under One Crown
abilities.text: When an enemy model within 3" with a Wreathed upgrade cheats fate or empowers, deal 1 damage to it.

actions.name: The Royal Treatment
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Offerings
triggers.text: Discard a Wreathed upgrade from the target. Make up to two Scheme markers in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: A Generous Gift...
triggers.text: Summon a Gift of Thorns into base contact with the target.

actions.name: Heavy is the Crown
actions.effects: Summon up to two Gift of Thorns in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Lost to the Depths
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. The target heals 2 and may remove one token. For each raise this action receives, the target heals an additional +1.

triggers.name: We Sense Their Wake
triggers.text: The target moves up to its Sp toward a model with an attached Wreathed upgrade.

triggers.name: Our Brethren Call
triggers.text: The target may declare an attack targeting a model with an attached Wreathed upgrade.
